title: cleome trachysperma
intro: Cleome trachysperma, also known as Spider Flower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cleome trachysperma include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
